description: Wissenscheck:  Was Frameworks sind (z. B. Bootstrap oder Tailwind) und wann man sie ausprobieren kann.

options.label: A prebuilt CSS system you can use

explanations.overview: A framework is a prebuilt collection of styles and UI utilities.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. A framework is a prebuilt collection of styles and UI utilities.
byOptionId.b: Correct. A framework is a prebuilt collection of styles and UI utilities.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. A framework is a prebuilt collection of styles and UI utilities.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. A framework is a prebuilt collection of styles and UI utilities.

questions.prompt: When is a good time to start using frameworks?

options.label: Before learning any CSS at all

explanations.overview: After understanding basic CSS, frameworks can speed up bigger projects.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. After understanding basic CSS, frameworks can speed up bigger projects.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. After understanding basic CSS, frameworks can speed up bigger projects.
byOptionId.c: Correct. After understanding basic CSS, frameworks can speed up bigger projects.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. After understanding basic CSS, frameworks can speed up bigger projects.
